headline: Should You Buy the Dip in Western Digital Stock as Google Launches TurboQuant?
summary: A game-changing AI efficiency breakthrough from Google has rattled Western Digital’s growth narrative. Is WDC a buy-the-dip opportunity now?

headline: Western Digital Is the Best-Performing Nasdaq-100 Stock. Can It Keep Going?
summary: The stock market has been roiled lately, with a sharp sell-off hammering tech stocks in particular. Software and semiconductor names have taken the brunt of the pain, sending the Nasdaq-100 down more than 8% — a steeper drop than the S&P 500’s roughly 7% decline. It feels like a blanket statement at first glance: tech ... Western Digital Is the Best-Performing Nasdaq-100 Stock. Can It Keep Going?
